name: Fragrant Morphogenesis
descriptionTemplate:
Arithmetica Limit +1, Effects of the same type cannot stack.
For every 10 Base Aliemus the wielder has, they inflict +[StateArg1]% {Corrosion} stacks and cause +[StateArg2]% {Embryo Fusion}.
lore:
There was a dandelion. Smaller than any bird, lighter than any breeze.

When the dandelion passed over the first place, a wasteland, it asked the tumbleweeds scattered across the earth: how do you propagate?
The tumbleweeds answered: "We let our seeds drift to the winds, until they find soil worth taking root in."
A wanderer who drifts has no home. The dandelion sighed, and caught another breeze away.

When the dandelion passed over the second place, a desert, it asked the cacti dotting the sand: how do you survive?
The cacti answered: "We drive our roots deep underground, drawing from water that is scarce and precious."
Life endures with such stubbornness, even in the harshest of places. The dandelion turned this over in its thoughts, and moved on.

Before long, the dandelion drifted over a city.
Through the dark of night, every light that bloomed across it was a mark of human life.
At the end of its long journey, the dandelion's seed was finally ready to fall - down to that waiting earth below.
